title: announce.c: schnorr48_sign return value may not follow expected semantics
close_reason: Fixed: Changed schnorr48 return values from -1 to -EINVAL for consistent errno semantics. Updated callers in lichen_link_rx.c to check < 0 instead of == -1. Fixed race condition in announce.c by using pubkey copy from signed_data instead of re-reading from sched.link_ctx after mutex release.
